title: Recycle Leather
description: Recycle Leather is a Datapack for Minecraft that adds recipes for scrapping saddles and leather armors (human or horse).
body:
Recycle Leather is a Datapack for Minecraft that adds recipes for scrapping leather armor pieces, and horse saddles and armors.

All four leather armor pieces can be recycled. For horse equipement, saddles and leather horse armors can be recycled. All recycling recipes are unshapped, and return 1 leather.

The recipe book integration will show all recycling recipes as a group.

Enchanted, renamed, or trimmed armors can be recycled by dragging them in the crafting grid by hand, but, to avoid accidental destruction, the recipe book will not show the scrapping recipe as craftable for such items. 

You may also like
-----------------

* [OmniCut: Better Wood, Copper, and Stone Cutter](https://modrinth.com/datapack/omnicut-better-wood-stone-cutter) use the stonecutter to **cut wood logs** into a variety of wood products (e.g., stairs, slabs, fences, doors, etc.); **cut Copper block** to Cut Copper Stairs and Slabs variants, as well as **oxidized doors and trapdoors**; convert **Deepslate to Cobbled Deepslate**. Prices have been set carefully to avoid exploitation.
* [OmniBlast: Blast Furnace and Smoker recipe list completed]([https://modrinth.com/datapack/omniblast](https://modrinth.com/datapack/omniblast)) completes the recipe lists of the Blast Furnace and Smoker to enable faster cooking for blocks and items that have only a standard Furnace recipe (e.g., Glass, Glazed Terracota, Cactus, etc.)
* [RecycleBlast](https://modrinth.com/datapack/recycle-blast) adds recipes for scrapping metal armor pieces, horse armors, tools, and rails. Prices have been set carefully to avoid exploitation.
* [HorseArmorCraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/horse-armor-craft) adds smart recipes to craft horse armors and saddles.
* [HoneyStickyPiston](https://modrinth.com/datapack/honey-sticky-piston) use honeycombs as an alternative to slime balls to craft sticky pistons.
